content.en:
Through the space-time channel, everyone crossed one space-time territory after another, and soon came to the most marginal space-time territory-the Silent Territory.

The Silent Territory is a territory with a lord, it is the territory of the Silent Lord, but she has no ambitions, anyone can come to her territory, and she doesn't care much, she doesn't seem to care about anything, otherwise, she won't choose the Silent Territory far from the Source Sea.

The Silent Territory is one of the farthest space-time territories from the Source Sea, and if it is farther, the space-time territory will not be born, because if it is too far away from the Source Sea, it will not be regarded as dependent on the Source Sea, and naturally there will be no space-time territory.

"Entering the Void Zone from here, there will be a long distance behind you, you have to be mentally prepared!"

Gu He Yuanzu reminded.

"It's not the first time we've entered the Void Zone, Gu He Yuanzu, let's go quickly!"

An Eight Extremes Realm hurriedly urged.

"Let's go!"

Everyone immediately tore through the space-time barrier of the Silent Territory, entered the Void Zone, and immediately advanced towards the depths of the Void Zone.

And not long after they left, an Eternal Realm appeared.

They took a look at the direction in which Gu Heyuanzu and the others left, and immediately caught up, and chatted with each other at the same time.

"Gu He Yuanzu, this old guy actually knows the location of the Abyssal Land, it is rumored that the Abyss Land is one of the 250 holes of the Void Beast's nest, which contains countless precious resources, but it is a pity that the Immortal Realm Lords fought against the Void Beast at the beginning, and they didn't have time to care about the Abyssal Land, and the Abyssless Land was moved away, and they didn't know where to go. "

"If we get some benefits in the Abyssal Lands, we might be able to be promoted to the Lord of the Immortal Realm. "

"You also have to be careful of this group of eight-step Eternal Realm powerhouses, their strength is not weak, and there are many of them, we also have to join forces, don't be bullied by a group of half-step Eternal Realm!"

"That's nature!"

......

Time passed slowly, and at first, some of the Eight Extremes Realm could still withstand the environment of the Void Zone, but as time went on, they were also a little irritable, which could make the Eight Extremes Realm all have irritable emotions, which showed how terrifying the environment in the depths of the Void Region was.

Of course, the only ones who were really affected were those Eight Extremes Realm who had not yet condensed the second-order Eternal Will, and the Eight Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses like Ye Tian were very little affected and could almost be ignored.

However, when going deeper into the Void Region, the Second Order Eternal Will was a little uncomfortable.

At this time, there was an eight-pole realm and asked: "Gu He Yuan Ancestor, how far is it, if it continues like this, I can't bear it." "

"It's not far!" Gu Heyuan Ancestor replied. After a few more days, they finally arrived at their destination. then

It's here!"

Gu He Yuanzu pointed to a shadow land in front of him and said. ね.“ It's really an abyssless place!" A person in the Eight Extremes Realm was quite excited.

"Everyone be careful, if you want to enter the Abyssless Land, you must wait, only the moment the Abyss Land wants to move, you can enter it, otherwise you can't enter it at any other time. Gu He Yuanzu reminded.

"We know!" the other Eight Extremes nodded.

Immediately, many Eight Extremes Realms sat cross-legged around the Abyssless Land, silently waiting.

Soon, Gu Heyuanzu's expression changed and he looked into the distance.

Whoa!!!

The aura of an eternal realm appeared, and there was no concealment.

"Eternal Realm Lord!"

Gu Heyuanzu's face was a little ugly, he didn't want the Eternal Realm Lord to know, but he still exposed it.

The Eight Extremes Realm present had signed a contract, and it should not be exposed, so it could only be those Eight Extremes Realm who left to reveal the news, but how did those Eternal Realm Lords lock his position?

It stands to reason that they shuttle through space-time territories one by one, and the Eternal Realm Lord doesn't have time to track them!

Abrupt.

Lord Gu He saw an Eternal Realm and immediately understood.

"Lord of Silence!"

Not only Gu He understood, but the other Eight Extremes Realms also understood.

They left the realm of the Silent Lord, and the Silent Lord naturally knew about it.

It's just that they didn't expect the Silent Lord to immediately notify the other lords.

And when they fly in the void area, there is a breath escaping, so it is very obvious, but after a while, these breaths will be turned into nothingness by the void area, and there will be no trace.

But these lords track it in time, and they can naturally be traced.

At this time, there were only thirty-three Eternal Realm Lords who arrived, which was not a lot of numbers, but among them, there were many Eternal Realm Lords at the peak of their peak.

Although the half-step Eternal Realm of the Eight Extremes Realm can be compared to the weaker Eternal Realm, that is, the weaker Eternal Realm powerhouse, even if it is the Gu He Lord who has touched the second boundary barrier, it is at most comparable to an ordinary Eternal Realm powerhouse, but it can't beat the lord of the peak of the Eternal Realm.

Their only advantage is that they are numerous, and the number of Eternal Realm Lords who arrive is relatively small.

"Lord of Silence, I really thought you didn't care about anything?"

Gu He Yuanzu sneered.

The Silent Lord didn't care at all about Gu He's ridicule, and said with a smile: "I really don't care about many things, but if you don't care about the Abyssal Land, I can't care less, I also want to become the Lord of the Immortal Realm, but many great opportunities are occupied by those Immortal Realm Lords, and the Land of the Abyss is an opportunity for me." "

Gu He Yuanzu didn't want to fight either, after all, they didn't have an advantage, but they weren't easy to mess with.

So, Gu He Yuanzu proposed: "After we enter, we won't interfere with each other, how about it? After all, the Abyssless Land is a lair of the Void Beast, and now I am afraid that there are still Void Beasts, and we are not your hindrance and enemy." "

"Don't worry, as long as you don't trouble us, we won't trouble you, everyone's purpose is just to find an opportunity!" said the Silent Lord with a smile.

That being said, there is a certain hostility towards each other.

In fact, the relationship between the Eight Poles Tower and the Lord of the Immortal Realm is very bad, which is a well-known situation in the space-time realm.

Because the Eternal Realm Lords were almost all ordinary half-step Eternal Realms, not Extreme Realm and half-step Eternal Realms, and if the Eight-Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm could break through to the Eternal Realm, almost as soon as they broke through, they would be immortal.

The Eight Extremes Realm looks down on ordinary half-step Eternal Realms, and once they break through to the Eternal Realm, they also look down on ordinary Eternal Realm Lords.

Now, these Immortal Realm Lords naturally want to take advantage of the inability to break through the Eight Extremes Realm to find trouble in the Eight Extremes Realm.

The only thing that relieved Gu He Yuanzu was that there was no Immortal Realm Lord and Immortal Realm to participate this time, otherwise there would be no share of them.

And those Eternal Realm Lords will not notify the Immortal Realm and Immortal Realm Lords.

In the blink of an eye, several years of calamity have passed.

On this day, the abyssal land shook up.

It's going to move!_
